related_files: kernel/ecs/src/archetype.rs — convert columns to `Vec<Option<ColumnRow>>`; pad-on-insert; per-row removal leaves placeholder; entity-aware swap-remove; new `has_component_at_row`; archetype-level sparse unit tests.
